title: ADGENCOV: Algebraic-Diversity Genetic Covariance estimation for transcriptomics
description: A high-performance C++17 toolkit for estimating gene-gene covariance and precision networks from transcriptomic expression matrices using Algebraic Diversity (AD) symmetry-group projections combined with classical shrinkage estimators. Ships a CLI, a pybind11 Python API, a FastAPI backend, and GEO ingestion.
